notes: Domain contract and PII-safe legal OCR fixture manifest integrated on master; validator happy path, negative missing document_type, PII scan, py_compile, and diff check passed.
recova-debt-collection ontology config integrated on master; json.tool, validator happy path, missing-class failure scenario, focused pytest, PII scan, py_compile, and diff check passed.

trustgraph_legal dry-run OCR markdown ingest registry integrated on master; real OCR zip dry-run wrote 5 registry records to task-4-dry-run.json, duplicate tests passed, PII scans clean, py_compile and diff check passed.

Ontology extraction prompt semantics integrated on master; rendered prompt uses exact legal ontology IDs and JSONL entity/relationship/attribute examples, legal source evidence is prompt-required, new legal semantics test plus focused ontology slice passed 56 tests, PII scan and diff checks clean.

Document classifier and field extractor contracts integrated on master; classifier outputs canonical document_type plus fixture metadata, field extraction emits normalized fields with source spans, task-5 classifier/fields evidence generated at root, legal ontology tests passed 14 tests, Python 3.9 py_compile passed, PII scan and diff checks clean.

Hybrid case graph resolver integrated on master; case graph CLI wrote task-6-case-graph.json, exact evidence keys and case-packet ontology contract validated, focused and legal ontology tests passed 18 tests, Python 3.9 py_compile passed, sensitive scan and diff checks clean.

Deterministic StopGate engine integrated on master; static curated v0 legal rule source, trustgraph_legal.check CLI, pointer-only source_refs, invalid provenance hold, unapproved rule-source hold, and broader v0 type review behavior verified. Root tests passed: stop_gates 8, legal ontology suite 31, Python 3.9 py_compile, CLI decision 보류 with amount_mismatch, discharge_proceeding_detected, exempt_claim_targeted, limitation_risk, raw identifier scan clean for changed Todo 7/8 code and evidence.

Ontology candidate and reprocessing workflow integrated on master; governance service records keep production ontology read-only, create candidates/review items/reprocess plans for unsupported contract document types, and reject promotion without approval/regression metadata. Root tests passed: governance 5, legal ontology suite 31, Python 3.9 py_compile, task-8 governance JSON contract check, raw identifier scan clean for changed Todo 7/8 code and evidence.

Agent-agnostic MCP domain brain tools integrated into trustgraph-mcp; final working tree adds scoped auth boundary hardening, internal IAM scope authorizer, repo-root path bounds, token-resolver registration, stable 16-tool contract, and focused unit/integration tests.

MCP domain server contract, generic client config, decision contract, source_refs/redaction policy, memory-conflict policy, evaluator CLI, and task-10 regression evidence completed; final docs updated to clarify gateway whoami plus internal IAM authorise_many scope boundary.

Final reviewer blockers fixed: MCP scope authorization no longer calls public gateway websocket iam/authorise-many; production scope decisions use internal IamClient.authorise_many; scope-authorizer dependency/config failures are not swallowed as token rejection. Smoke proves internal_scope_authorizer_used=true, public_authorise_many_used=false, bad token rejected, reader governance rejected, token echo false.

Final verification passed: legal ontology unit suite 42 passed, MCP integration 3 passed, py_compile on changed legal/MCP/evaluator/test files passed, evaluator CLI status passed/tool_count=16/decision=보류, git diff checks passed, sensitive scan clean, smoke temp cleanup clean. Final reviewers accepted: security authz rerun, goal gate rerun, code authz final.
